---
title: "reporter.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/reporter.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.42
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 6.20
overall_score: 4.92
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignReporter, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignReporter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignReporter`
- `__init__`
- `render_hud`
- `record_trace`
